narrative:
Miamisburg City has 14,269 registered voters, with 57.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.3 percentage points.
